title: [FUTURE] Add graph links between landmarks, goals, and pages in MemorySmith
description:
Once MemorySmith supports graph relations, link world pages together to form a spatial-semantic knowledge graph of the agent's world experience.

This is explicitly a FUTURE phase (Phase 4) per the design doc. Do not start until:
- MemorySmith supports graph relation endpoints.
- Embedding phase (TSK-0156) is complete or at least the backend is ready.

Implementation sketch:
1. Link landmark pages to nearby landmarks (spatial proximity edges).
2. Link goal pages to landmarks where they were executed.
3. Link failure pages to the goals/actions they relate to.
4. Enable graph traversal queries: "landmarks near position X", "goals executed at landmark Y", "common failures at landmark Z".
5. Use `MemorySmith.CodeSearch` MCP tool or equivalent for graph queries.

Acceptance: Deferred until MemorySmith backend supports graph relations.

Refs: `memorysmith_situational_awareness_design_doc_20260625T020914Z.md` Phase 4
blockedReason: MemorySmith backend does not yet expose graph relation endpoints.
